title: astragalus listoniae
intro: Astragalus listoniae, also known as Huangqi, is a traditional Chinese medicinal plant belonging to the legume family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus listoniae include boosting the immune system, reducing fatigue and stress, and supporting cardiovascular health. Traditionally, Astragalus listoniae is prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
